content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help, Sarah!

options.text: No problem! Just email me if anything's unclear.
I'm busy right now, can you wait?
You're welcome, but I didn't do much.
Why are you thanking me? It was my job.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了礼貌、积极的职场回应，同时提供后续支持。干扰项中，第二个显得不耐烦，第三个贬低自己的帮助，第四个态度生硬，都不符合职场中提升形象的礼貌原则。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you walking me through this process.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你带我走了一遍这个流程。

options.text: Anytime! Let me know if you need anything else.
I didn't have time for this, but okay.
You should have learned this faster.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了开放、友好的支持态度，是职场道别感谢的典型回应。干扰项语气消极、冷漠或指责，违背了职场礼仪和积极沟通原则。

content.speakerText: Thanks for staying late to help me finish the report.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你加班帮我完成报告。

options.text: It was no trouble at all. I'm glad I could help.
I had nothing else to do.
Don't mention it. I hope you don't need help again.
I'm getting paid for this, so it's fine.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达真诚、积极的回应，强化团队合作氛围。干扰项暗示敷衍、不情愿或功利心态，会损害职场人际关系。

content.template: Thanks so much! ___ be sure to reach out if you need anything.
content.hint: 表达未来愿意继续提供帮助的常用结构
content.knowledgePoint: I'll = I will（表示愿意未来提供帮助的承诺表达）

content.template: I really ___ your support — it made a big difference.
content.hint: 表达感谢的正式动词，常用于职场语境
content.knowledgePoint: appreciate + 名词/动名词（职场感谢核心动词）

content.template: No problem! ___ have a wonderful day!
content.hint: 道别时祝福对方的主语结构
content.knowledgePoint: You have a...（道别祝福句型的主语使用）

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help, Sarah!
expectedAnswers: No problem! Feel free to email me if you have more questions.
Anytime! I'm happy to help — have a great week!
You're welcome! Don't hesitate to reach out anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢并表达了开放支持态度
语言准确性：语法正确，无中式英语表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常职场表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词（如：email, reach out, anytime, help）

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you taking the time to explain this to me.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你抽出时间向我解释这些。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure — I'm glad it made sense!
Of course! I know how busy you are, so I'm happy to help clarify.
Not at all! Let me know if anything else comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并强化支持意愿
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词搭配（如：my pleasure, happy to help）
表达自然度：语气亲切、非机械，符合职场语境
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词（如：pleasure, happy to help, clarify, reach out）

content.speakerText: Thank you for staying late to finish the project with me.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你留下来和我一起完成项目。
expectedAnswers: It was no trouble at all — teamwork makes the dream work!
I'm glad I could support you. Let me know if you need help again next week.
Absolutely! I value working together — have a great evening!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否认可对方付出并表达积极情感
语言准确性：使用了恰当的感谢回应结构（如：no trouble, glad I could）
表达自然度：语气温暖、真诚，非公式化
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词（如：no trouble, glad I could, support, teamwork）
